title: Announcing Google Antigravity SDK
summary: Google Antigravity SDK is an agentic development platform that evolves the IDE into an agent-first experience. The platform enables developers to manage autonomous agents across workspaces, editors, terminals, and browsers to plan and execute complex end-to-end software development tasks.
